nasb.text: She will be a place for the spreading of nets in the midst of the sea, for I have spoken,’ declares the Lord God, ‘and she will become spoil for the nations.

esv.text: She shall be in the midst of the sea a place for the spreading of nets, for I have spoken, declares the Lord God. And she shall become plunder for the nations,

cnv.text: 它必在海中作曬網的地方，因為我已經說了。這是耶和華的宣告。它必成為列國的掠物，

ccb.text: 在海中做晒网的地方，你必被列国掳掠，因为我已宣告。这是主耶和华说的。
